query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS googleAuthTokens (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  accessToken LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
  refreshToken LONGTEXT,
  expiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  scope LONGTEXT,
  tokenType VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Bearer',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 45QM5TxEffSRUYR.root --database 6856TeX4yea3eYHoBQTyWM --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS googleAuthTokens (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  accessToken LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
  refreshToken LONGTEXT,
  expiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  scope LONGTEXT,
  tokenType VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Bearer',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
